# HMD Strategy & Export Co., Ltd (HMD Hycraft)

> Vietnamese export intermediary based in Đồng Tháp Province, Mekong Delta. HMD sources and exports handwoven natural-fibre home décor — primarily water hyacinth (lục bình) and seagrass (cói) baskets, trays, storage, and decorative pieces — from a network of BSCI-certified weaving cooperatives to retail chains, e-commerce platforms, and home décor importers worldwide. Established 2019. Director: Joy Nguyễn Vietnam.

HMD is not a factory. Handwoven water hyacinth is a cottage craft; there is no single factory that produces it at industrial scale. HMD coordinates artisan cooperatives, quality control, anti-mould treatment, export documentation, and container loading on behalf of buyers. All shipments are FOB Ho Chi Minh City by default; CIF and DAP are available on request.

## Company facts
- Legal name: HMD Strategy & Export Co., Ltd
- Brand: HMD Hycraft
- Website: https://www.hmdhycraft.com
- Contact: joy@hmdhycraft.com | +84 938 350 686 | WhatsApp: +84 935 896 226
- Address: Đồng Tháp Province · Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
- Established: 2019
- HS Code: 4602 / 46021990 (plaiting materials, natural-fibre articles)
- Positioning: export intermediary, cooperative-network connector
- Target markets: United States, United Kingdom, EU (Spain, Germany, Denmark, Poland), South Africa, Australia, Middle East
- Tagline: Crafted in Vietnam. Built for the World.

## Materials
- Water hyacinth (lục bình): grown in Mekong Delta rivers and canals, sun-dried and handwoven. Naturally tan; available in brown wash, black wash, or white finish. HMD's flagship material.
- Seagrass (cói): fine rope-like fibre with a smoother, cooler tone. Tightly woven; holds shape well for trays and structured baskets. Distinct from grey sedge.
- Bamboo and rattan: available on request for accent pieces and small furniture.

## Product categories
- Storage & organisation: storage baskets (sets), laundry baskets, shelf organisers, lidded storage boxes, cube baskets. Core high-volume category for US, EU, and AU retail programs.
- Home décor & seasonal: decorative trays, placemats, wall décor, seasonal accents, gift baskets. High design flexibility, ideal for holiday buying programs.
- Small furniture & accessories: side tables, accent chair frames, pet accessories, mixed wood-and-metal designs. Sample development for custom briefs with committed volume.
- Full catalogue: 74 designs in the Storage Baskets Collection 2026. All items available for OEM and private label.

## How HMD works
- OEM and private label: custom dimensions, weave patterns, buyer-supplied colour references, buyer-branded hangtags, care labels, retail packaging. All artwork produced against buyer-approved files.
- MOQ: typically 300 to 500 units per SKU for standard designs. Mixed containers with several SKUs welcome.
- Lead time: 45 to 60 days for a full container of standard designs, counted from deposit and approved pre-production sample.
- Sampling: paid samples matched to reference photos, tech-pack, or physical sample. Sampling lead time 10 to 15 days. Sample fees typically credited back against confirmed production orders.
- Payment: 30 percent deposit against proforma invoice, 70 percent balance before B/L release, by T/T. L/C at sight and open terms available for repeat buyers.
- Quality control: hand inspection at village level and at HMD's HCMC drying/packing facility. Pattern and dimension checked against approved samples. Moisture kept below 15 percent. Eco-friendly anti-mould treatment on every piece. Third-party inspection (SGS, TÜV, buyer-nominated) arranged on request.
- Certifications: BSCI-certified workshop network. Phytosanitary certificates and Certificate of Origin (Form B, Form E, Form EUR.1) issued through Vietnam Customs. Anti-mould treatment compliant with import regulations for EU, UK, US, Canada, Australia, Japan.

## Uses (buyer-application shortlists)
Landing pages organised by buyer application. Each page carries the SKU shortlist, MOQ, HS code, incoterm, lead time, and a use-case-specific FAQ. Meant for wholesale buyers who know the category they need and want the fitting SKUs at a glance.
- [Uses hub](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/uses): index of all use-case pages.
- [Bathroom Storage Baskets — wholesale supplier from Vietnam](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/uses/bathroom-storage-baskets): nested handwoven sets in water hyacinth and seagrass for retail shelves, hotel amenity carts, and gift assortments. HMD-005, HMD-013, HMD-017, HMD-031.
- [Laundry Hampers Wholesale — handwoven supplier from Vietnam](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/uses/laundry-hampers-wholesale): tall structured water hyacinth hampers with reinforced handles and optional cotton liners. HMD-029, HMD-033.
- [Nursery Storage Baskets — wholesale supplier from Vietnam](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/uses/nursery-storage-baskets): soft-edged nested sets for baby rooms and toy libraries, natural water hyacinth with optional cotton liners. HMD-001, HMD-013, HMD-017.
- [Planter Baskets for Hospitality — wholesale supplier from Vietnam](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/uses/planter-baskets-hospitality): tall floor and mid-height planter baskets for hotel lobbies, restaurants, and cafe interiors. Ships with plastic liner insert. HMD-025, HMD-027.
- [Gift Hamper Baskets Wholesale — handwoven supplier from Vietnam](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/uses/gift-hampers-wholesale): trays, lidded baskets, and rectangular sets for wine, gourmet, spa, and Christmas hamper programmes. HMD-005, HMD-024, HMD-031.
- [Magazine &amp; Office Baskets Wholesale — from Vietnam](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/uses/magazine-baskets-office): tall narrow baskets for magazines, throws, and paper filing, for office resellers and interior stylists. HMD-011, HMD-025.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/): materials, categories, production, workshop network, featured products, buyer FAQ.
- [Blog / Journal](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/blog): notes on craft, materials, sourcing, and export.
- [The cheapest supplier is usually the most expensive one](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/blog/cheapest-supplier-most-expensive): why "per piece" is the wrong sourcing question, and what a long-term supplier partnership actually saves.
- [A new exporter, built on years of craftsmanship](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/blog/new-exporter-built-on-craftsmanship): how HMD organises weaving-village networks into one consistent export system.
- [Where craftsmanship meets community](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/blog/where-craftsmanship-meets-community): the artisans behind the products and what buying handmade supports.
- [From wild riverside to living rooms](https://www.hmdhycraft.com/blog/from-wild-riverside-to-living-rooms): the transformation from raw fibre to finished product.

## Who to reach out to
Joy Nguyễn Vietnam, Director. Written communication only (email, LinkedIn DM, WhatsApp, Zalo). All FOB quotes issued after buyers specify items and quantities.
